title: erucastrum elatum var. microspermum
intro: Erucastrum elatum var. microspermum, also known as shepherd's purse microspermum, is a variant of the Erucastrum elatum plant, a member of the Brassicaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a hemostatic agent and being used to treat various health issues such as coughs, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Erucastrum elatum var. microspermum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Erucastrum elatum var. microspermum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
